topics.title: Maurya Empire
topics.summary: Maurya Empire was founded by Chandragupta Maurya in 322 BCE. It was one of the largest empires in ancient India.

topics.title: Gupta Empire
topics.summary: Gupta Empire is known as the Golden Age of India in science, art and literature.

topics.title: Delhi Sultanate
topics.summary: Delhi Sultanate ruled India from 1206 to 1526 with multiple dynasties.

topics.title: Mughal Empire
topics.summary: Mughal Empire was established by Babur in 1526 after the Battle of Panipat.

topics.title: India Geography
topics.summary: India has diverse geography including mountains, plains, deserts and coastal areas.

topics.title: Rivers of India
topics.summary: Major rivers of India include Ganga, Yamuna, Brahmaputra and Godavari.

topics.title: Cells
topics.summary: Cell is the basic unit of life. All living organisms are made of cells.

topics.title: Human Body
topics.summary: Human body consists of different organ systems working together.

topics.title: HTML Basics
topics.summary: HTML is the standard language used to create web pages.

topics.title: JavaScript Basics
topics.summary: JavaScript is used to make websites interactive and dynamic.

topics.title: Physics
topics.summary: Physics studies matter, energy and their interactions.

topics.title: Chemistry
topics.summary: Chemistry studies substances and their reactions.

topics.title: Countries and Capitals
topics.summary: Different countries of the world and their capitals.

topics.title: Inventions
topics.summary: Important inventions that changed the world.
